message:
feat(e2e): expand hot-path profiling with baseline ledgers, wall-time decomposition, and microarch signatures

The hot-path actionable ranking was limited to named hotspots, cost
components, and allocator pressure entries, making it impossible to
distinguish baseline-tax waste from structural contention cost or to
attribute wall time to specific runtime phases. The ranking also
referenced the old Track D bead IDs instead of the revised Track I/J
numbering, and had no support for microarchitectural signature
classification.

Changes to perf_runner.rs:
- Bump actionable ranking schema from v2 to v3 to reflect the
  expanded artifact shape.
- Add HotPathBaselineReuseLedgerEntry and HotPathBaselineWasteLedgerEntry
  structs for classifying cache-hit, reuse, and waste rates across
  parser, decode, and materialization surfaces.
- Add HotPathWallTimeComponentEntry for decomposing wall time into
  queueing, synchronization, retry, service, allocator_copy, and
  durability lanes using RuntimePhaseTimingEvidence.
- Add HotPathMicroarchitecturalSignatureEntry and
  HotPathMicroarchitecturalContext for classifying topology-sensitive
  behavior (ownership_ping_pong_hitm, remote_numa_traffic,
  durability_pressure, etc.) with confidence scores and evidence
  source tracking.
- Make FsqliteHotPathProfileConfig accept optional bead_id and
  scenario_prefix so the profiling pipeline can be reused across
  different bead contexts (e.g. bd-db300.1.3 artifact capture).
- Update all hotspot, allocator, and cost-component implication
  functions to reference revised Track I/J bead IDs (bd-db300.9.x,
  bd-db300.10.x) instead of the old Track D numbering.
- Add wall_time_component_implication, component_signature_shape, and
  hot_path_signature_confidence_label functions for the new ranking
  dimensions.
- Expand build_hot_path_actionable_ranking to accept optional
  counter capture summary and microarchitectural context, producing
  the four new ledger/decomposition sections.
- Expand render_hot_path_profile_markdown to emit Baseline Reuse
  Ledger, Baseline Waste Ledger, Wall-Time Decomposition, and
  Microarchitectural Signatures sections.
- Add HOT_PATH_TEST_LOCK for test-level mutex guarding of global
  profiling state.

Changes to realdb_e2e.rs:
- Add resolve_hot_path_workspace_root_candidate helper for locating
  the benchmark workspace from candidate directories.
- Import BenchmarkMode and PLACEMENT_PROFILE_BASELINE_UNPINNED from
  fixture_select for placement-aware profiling.
- Import HotPathMicroarchitecturalContext from perf_runner.
- Thread optional counter capture summary and microarch context
  through to build_hot_path_actionable_ranking calls.
- Update the hot-path profile pipeline to use configurable bead_id
  and scenario_prefix from FsqliteHotPathProfileConfig.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
